name: SEATech Ventures Corp.
business: SEATech Ventures Corp. provides business mentoring, nurturing and incubation services, and corporate development advisory to entrepreneurs in the information and communication technology (ICT) industry, primarily in Asia. Its core program is the ICT Start-Up Mentorship Program designed to assist tech-based entrepreneurs with technical, financial, and strategic challenges. The company also acts as a listing sponsor for digital asset tokenization on Green-X, a Shariah-compliant digital asset exchange.
sellsTo: Malaysia and Hong Kong based ICT companies
high-net-worth clients seeking digital asset exposure

exposures.sentence: SEATech Group principal activity is to provide business mentoring services, nurturing and incubation services relating to client businesses and corporate development advisory services to entrepreneurs in the broader technology industry, but with a specific focus on the information and communication technology industry.

On September 20, 2022 Greenpro Capital Corp., a related party (NASDAQ: GRNQ) appointed SEATech Ventures (HK) Limited as a listing sponsor to engage potential token issuers to list on Green-X, the World s first Shariah-Compliant ESG (environment, social and governance) Digital Asset Exchange ( DAX ) in Labuan, Malaysia.
Assisting family offices and investment-oriented clients in evaluating business opportunities, including ICT-related investments, structuring transactions, and providing ongoing strategic support.
The Internet of Things (IoT) market in Asia-Pacific is projected to grow at a CAGR of 12.4% through 2030, reaching an estimated $392.76 billion.
the regional AR/VR market is forecast to expand significantly to $52.29 billion by 2032.
emphasized the integration of robotics to address aging populations and labor shortages.

tamClaims.claim: Asset tokenization market projected to expand from ~$310 billion in 2022 to $16.1 trillion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a 2022 report by global consulting firm BCG, the asset tokenization market was projected to expand from approximately US$310 billion in 2022 to US$16.1 trillion by 2030, representing a significant long-term growth opportunity in the digital asset sector.

tamClaims.claim: Asia-Pacific IoT market projected to grow at 12.4% CAGR through 2030, reaching $392.76 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: The Internet of Things (IoT) market in Asia-Pacific is projected to grow at a CAGR of 12.4% through 2030, reaching an estimated $392.76 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Regional AR/VR market forecast to expand to $52.29 billion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: the regional AR/VR market is forecast to expand significantly to $52.29 billion by 2032.

tamClaims.claim: Southeast Asian digital economy GMV surpassed $300 billion in 2025, projected to reach $1 trillion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: the Southeast Asian digital economy is positioned for continued expansion, with the long-term potential to reach a $1 trillion valuation by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Malaysian ICT market valued at ~$27.20 billion in 2025, projected CAGR of 7.57% through 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: According to industry data, the Malaysian ICT market was valued at approximately USD 27.20 billion in 2025 and is projected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.57% through 2029.
